What We Do

Our Services

From residential air conditioning installation in Harare to commercial HVAC solutions across Zimbabwe, we deliver the perfect climate for every need.

Cooling & Heating Solutions

Car A/C Regas & Service

Diagnose, regas and repair vehicle air conditioning so drivers stay cool in Zimbabwean heat.

Learn more

Home Heating & Cooling

Supply and install energy-efficient units for bedrooms and lounges that both cool and heat.

Learn more

Office Climate Control

Air conditioning and ventilation for offices, shops, restaurants, churches and workplaces.

Learn more

Portable A/C for Hire

Short-term portable aircon rental for weddings, conferences, events, tents and marquees.

Learn more

Gas Heaters for Hire

Gas heater rentals for outdoor and indoor events, restaurants and emergency heating.

Learn more
Ventilation & Air Quality

Whirlybird Installation

Roof turbine ventilators to remove hot air and improve comfort without heavy electricity use.

Learn more

Extractor Fan Installation

Kitchen, bathroom, industrial and commercial extractor fans to remove heat, smoke and smells.

Learn more
Why ProAir

Why Choose ProAir Zimbabwe?

We are Harare's trusted air conditioning specialists, delivering quality and affordability across Zimbabwe.

Trusted & Reliable

Over a decade of trusted aircon installation and servicing in Zimbabwe.

Affordable Pricing

Competitive rates without compromising on quality — air conditioning solutions for every budget.

Nationwide Coverage

Based in Harare, servicing all major towns across Zimbabwe.

Expert Technicians

Certified, experienced professionals handling every project with precision and care.
